description: Our client is looking to hire a The IT Services Administrator will help co\-ordinate and provide analysis of various IT services such as the IT Helpdesk, Asset management and IT Audits. **Responsibilities** * Manage and co\-ordinate the ITSM tool, utilizing the system to record, assign, track, close, and analyse all IT Helpdesk requests, Incidents, Problems \& Changes. * Maintain communication with internal and external users, keeping them informed of the status of theirrequests and follows\-up with users to ensure that requests were completed to their satisfaction. * Produce statistical reporting on requests, Incidents, Problems \& Changes. * Review emails and alerts to log incidents as required. **Requirements** * Two or more years’ experience in a Service Desk role, preferably within a corporate department * Practical knowledge of ITIL framework. * Successful experience prioritizing multiple tasks, managing requests and adapting to a changingenvironment while remaining professional and efficient * Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal Due to the volume of applications, only candidates whose experience closely matches the requirements of the role will be contacted.

title: Implementation Consultant – Fintech
description: **Implementation Consultant – Fintech** This is an excellent opportunity to join a well\-established, high\-performing software business operating within the financial technology space. The company develops enterprise\-grade platforms used by global clients to manage complex financial operations and reporting processes. The business continues to invest in modern technologies, automation, and AI\-driven solutions to improve efficiency and deliver value to clients. **About the role** We are looking for an **Implementation Consultant** who combines strong technical capability with client\-facing confidence. This role suits someone who enjoys solving complex problems, working with data, and guiding customers through system implementations. You’ll likely have: * **2\-5 years’ experience** in a technical, consulting, or fintech\-related role * Exposure to **financial services, fund accounting, or investment operations** (highly beneficial) * Strong **data handling skills** , with experience in **SQL and/or advanced Excel** * A genuine interest in **AI, automation, and improving operational efficiency** * The ability to communicate clearly with both technical and non\-technical stakeholders * A proactive mindset with strong problem\-solving and organisational skills **Responsibilities** In this position, you’ll work closely with clients and internal teams to deliver and support enterprise software solutions. Your day\-to\-day will include: * Gathering and understanding client requirements and business processes * Configuring and tailoring software solutions to meet customer needs * Supporting system implementations, testing phases, and go\-live activities * Writing and executing test cases and validation processes * Collaborating with development teams to enhance product functionality * Managing and resolving client queries, issues, and change requests * Troubleshooting problems and delivering clear, effective solutions * Supporting integrations, data workflows, and system configurations * Leveraging AI tools and automation to improve efficiency and delivery **Nice to Have / Bonus Skills** While not essential, the following would strengthen your application: * Knowledge of investment products, fund administration, or financial reporting * Experience with SQL, database queries, or data analysis tools * Familiarity with AI tools or modern development assistants (e.g. Claude, Copilot, automation tools) * Exposure to software testing frameworks or development tools * Experience working with support systems or ticketing platforms * Understanding of cloud platforms or modern software delivery environments **Why Join** * Excellent salary package with performance incentives * Great benefits including pension, healthcare, and wellness support * Hybrid working model * Very strong team environment with experienced leadership * Low attrition and long\-tenured team * Clear opportunities for career progression and skill development * Exposure to modern technologies, AI tools, and global clients

title: Incident Management Engineer (Portuguese/English bilingual), Incident Detection and Response
description: **DESCRIPTION** --------------- Amazon has built a reputation for excellence with a mission to be the earth’s most customer\-centric company, a company that customers from all over the globe will recognize, value, and trust for both our products and our service. Amazon Web Services (AWS) is carrying on that tradition while leading the world in cloud technologies. The AWS Incident Detection and Response team is part of the ASPIRE organisation within AWS Support, and is dedicated to offering eligible AWS Enterprise Support customers proactive engagement and incident management to reduce the potential for failure and to accelerate recovery of critical workloads from disruption. We achieve these objectives by working closely with customers to develop runbooks and response plans customized to the context of each workload onboarded to the service. Onboarded workloads are monitored 24x7 by a team of Incident Management Engineers (IMEs) to detect and engage customers on a call bridge within 5 minutes of a critical alarm. ABOUT YOU Incident Management Engineers have a broad skill set with demonstrated career progression and a proven track record of delivering results. The successful candidate will possess strong analytical acumen, solid technology experience, superb business judgment, strategic account ownership and a propensity to dive deep to solve complex problems. You will also have a passion for creating/providing a world class experience for our customers. The candidate must understand the competitive and industry landscape and must have the leadership presence and communication skills to effectively work with customers at all levels of their organization. You must be a self\-starter and able to execute at both a tactical and strategic level – with a strong attention to detail. This is a global role that requires excellent written and verbal communication skills and a passion and desire for leading the resolution of critical incidents. Your decisions are not only fundamental to helping protect our most critical customers but will help maintain the health of AWS customers worldwide. Finally, you are passionate about technology with a desire to learn more and do more with AWS. ABOUT THE ROLE AWS Support is looking for a leader with a strong background in Incident Management and customer ownership to be there during the moments that matter for our most critical customers. We are looking for an Incident Management Engineer to join our team to provide incident response and account ownership. In this position, you will play a pivotal role in providing communication, emergency response, technical resolver engagement and incident management for our customers. Please note as a follow\-the\-sun organisation, IMEs work the core hours of 9am\-5pm AEST. Successful applicants will be required to work some weekends (Sunday to Thursday, or Tuesday to Saturday), and public holidays. Key job responsibilities * Every day will bring new and exciting challenges that include elements of: * Drive the resolution of large scale customer impacting incidents as part of a team rotation * Drive critical, complex customer escalations in situations that are sometimes technically challenging in collaboration with Engineering Teams. * Provide critical incident response/management (including leading calls with internal/external participants) for customer’s critical workloads * Contribute to Problem Records for customers * Conduct continuous real\-time proactive monitoring of customer metrics * Prioritize, manage, and own emerging and developing customer issues from start to finish * Monitor and manage communications during high impact events via relevant channels * Collaborate with key stakeholders across AWS to improve the customer experience and develop mechanisms that support operational excellence * Lead projects and teams to drive operational improvements * Create and review documentation; design/influence new standard operating procedures * Identify and troubleshoot recurring platform issues and own projects to drive improvements * Mentor peers in your areas of technical and operational strength * Perform other duties as required by the organization About the team Diverse Experiences AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying. Why AWS? Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses. Inclusive Team Culture Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon ( diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness. Mentorship \& Career Growth We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional. Work/Life Balance We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud. **BASIC QUALIFICATIONS** ------------------------ * Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent, or experience in technical support * Experience in network and operating system support * Experience with virtualization, orchestration and cloud computing (eg. Hypervisors, VMware, Xen) * Experience with database administration * Experience in software development with object oriented language * Experience with continuous integration and continuous delivery * Experience in information security and compliance **PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS** ---------------------------- * AWS Associate level certification, or AWS Professional level certification * Knowledge of Lean methodologies * Experience comfort with ambiguity * Experience that includes strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and effective communication abilities * Experience developing and driving projects with tight schedules and multiple dependencies * Knowledge of distributed and service\-oriented architectures * Experience performing complex business case analysis to justify technical decisions and presenting the justification to management in a high\-level review Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates. Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: Information Technology Help Desk Support
description: **IT Helpdesk Technician** An I **nternational Professional Services Organisation** with offices in Dublin 2 are seeking to hire an experienced **IT Helpdesk Technician** to support their **800\+ users** with IT Support and Infrastructure maintenance. *This is a permanent role with excellent benefits and progression opportunities.* * Hybrid role; The successful candidate will be required to work on site initially for training and then move to a hybrid working model of 3 days on site per week. * Excellent benefits package which includes: 23 days Annual Leave, Health Insurance and Pension, Income Protection Insurance and Life Assurance, onsite gym etc. **Responsibilities:** * Deliver first\-level technical support to end users through phone, email, or in\-person interactions. * Accurately and efficiently record all support requests and incidents in the ticketing system. * Troubleshoot and resolve hardware, software, and network issues by diagnosing problems and researching solutions. * Escalate complex or unresolved issues to senior IT Service Desk Analysts or other IT teams within the IT Department as needed. * Ensure all service desk tickets are properly prioritised, categorised, and resolved in accordance with established service level agreements (SLAs). * Follow all established procedures and processes, including thorough documentation and follow\-up, to maintain consistent and high\-quality service delivery. * Assist with user account management, including account creation, administration, password resets, and access control. * Provide guidance and basic training to end users on software applications and IT services. * Support the IT AV technician with in\-house and external client\-facing hybrid meetings, including IT AV assistance for Microsoft Teams and Zoom meetings. **Experience \& Background:** * Minimum 2\-3 years IT Service Desk / Helpdesk experience in a fast paced environment. * Previous Professional Services experience is highly desired. * You have strong technical knowledge of operating systems, hardware and software. * You have experience in IT Applications including Microsoft Office 365, 2016 and Exchange Server. * Experience with Microsoft Azure environment is highly advantageous. If you meet the requirements, please send your CV to Sarah Friel via the enclosed link.

title: Information Technology Support Analyst
description: Our Dublin based client are looking for an **Information Technology Support Analyst** to join their team on a permanent basis You will have the opportunity to become part of an established and strong team and work for a company that is a market leader in their field There is an on site presence required for this role and the office is Dublin city centre based **Responsibilities:** * Provide technical support to end\-users and assist in resolving various IT issues in an effective and timely manner. * Learn to identify and resolve IT problems and issues as they arise * Troubleshoot hardware and software issues on site and via cloud services * Assist in the setup, configuration, and maintenance of end\-user devices, laptops and phones * Maintain a highly organised inventory of IT assets and resources (ITAM). * Assist in monitoring and tracking issues to prevent problems occurring a second or third time. * Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure escalations and tickets are registered and dealt with effectively. * Contribute to IT projects, including software deployments and hardware upgrades. * Escalation of technical issues to other team members when necessary and required **Skills and Requirements:** * Minimum of 2\-3 years of experience in a technical support role. * Experience with Active Directory, Azure AD, and managing security groups. * Ability to handle access requests and managing permissions. * Proven capabilities in troubleshooting Office 365 issues and software installations. * Proactive problem\-solving skills. * Have strong verbal and written communication skills. * Demonstrated teamwork skills, attention to detail, and a strong work ethic. * Enthusiasm for technology and a desire to learn and grow in the field. **HOW TO APPLY:** To apply for this role, please submit your updated CV. If your skills and experience match job requirements, you will be contacted to discuss your application in detail. **SIMILAR ROLES OPEN:** As a specialized recruitment agency, we also have several other permanent and contract IT roles available. Visit our website for more information or explore additional opportunities

title: Information Technology Support Analyst
description: **IT Service Desk Analyst** **Dublin, Ireland (Hybrid 3 days in the office)** **Salary on request** A leading professional services organisation is seeking an IT Service Desk Analyst to join its growing IT team. This is an excellent opportunity for an IT support professional looking to develop their career within a fast\-paced, technology\-driven environment that supports a large user base across multiple business functions. The organisation offers a collaborative culture, strong learning and development opportunities, and exposure to modern Microsoft technologies and enterprise IT environments. As an IT Service Desk Analyst, you will act as the first point of contact for end users, delivering exceptional technical support and customer service across a range of hardware, software, and collaboration technologies. You will be responsible for resolving incidents, managing service requests, supporting Microsoft technologies, and ensuring a high standard of service delivery while adhering to agreed SLAs. **Key Responsibilities** * Provide technical support to end users via phone, email, remote support, and in person. * Diagnose and resolve hardware, software, and operating system issues. * Support Windows\-based desktop and laptop environments. * Configure, deploy, image, and maintain end\-user devices. * Manage user accounts, permissions, password resets, and access requests. * Support Mobile Device Management (MDM) platforms and mobile devices. * Own incidents and service requests from logging through to resolution. * Ensure tickets are prioritised appropriately and resolved within SLA targets. * Provide support for Microsoft Teams, Zoom, and hybrid meeting room technology. * Create and maintain technical documentation and knowledge base articles. * Collaborate with infrastructure, networking, and end\-user computing teams. * Contribute to continuous service improvement initiatives. * Participate in an on\-call support rota when required. **Requirements:** You will have experience working in a busy IT support environment and possess strong troubleshooting and customer service skills. **Required Experience** * Min 2 years' experience in an IT Service Desk, IT Support, or Desktop Support role. * Experience supporting users within a corporate or professional services environment. Strong knowledge of: * Windows Operating Systems * Microsoft 365 * Exchange Online * Active Directory * Experience supporting desktop, laptop, and peripheral hardware. * Experience with device imaging, deployment, and configuration. * Familiarity with IT ticketing systems and ITIL principles. * Strong troubleshooting and problem\-solving skills. * Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills. **Desirable Skills** * Microsoft Intune * Mobile Device Management (MDM) * Azure * Microsoft Teams administration * Hybrid Microsoft environments **What's on Offer** * Hybrid working model * Exposure to modern Microsoft technologies * Strong learning and development opportunities * Collaborative and supportive team environment * Opportunity to work within a highly regarded professional services organisation * Competitive salary and benefits package If you are an IT Support professional looking to join a high\-performing IT team where you can continue to develop your technical and customer\-facing skills, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Inside Sales Representative - Airbnb (French Bilingual)
description: **About MarketStar:** In everything we do, we believe in creating growth, for our clients, our employees, and our community. For the past 35\+ years, we have been generating revenue for the most innovative tech companies across the globe through our outsourced B2B demand, sales, customer success, and revenue operations solutions. We are passionate about cultivating career advancements for our people, and support them through mentorship, leadership, and career\-development programs. We provide service and support to our communities through the MarketStar Foundation. Our exceptional team is the cornerstone of MarketStar's accomplishments. We are proud of our award\-winning workplace culture and to be named a top employer in our industry. These achievements are a testament to our six core values, embraced by our 3,000\+ employees worldwide. From our headquarters in Utah, USA, to our global offices in India, Ireland, Bulgaria, Mexico, the Philippines, and Australia, we all work together to drive innovation and success. **About The Inside Sales Executive:** MarketStar is looking for an Inside Sales Executive for an exciting new project. In this role you will be identifying and recruiting hosts for our client's growing business. The perfect candidate will possess a deep knowledge of the client's platform and exceptional networking abilities. Your responsibilities will include researching prospects, initiating contact, and closing new business via phone and video conference. This is B2B sales with SME and Sole Trader and short sales cycles of up to 1 week. **About Our Client:** Our client is one of the largest players in the hospitality space, acting as a broker for 250 million happy customer transactions every year and turning over more than $10Billion in revenue in 2024\. This a household brand in the top 1,000 organisations in terms of revenue, listed as a Forbes Global 2000 company and featured in the TIME World’s Best Companies of 2024\. The potential in this project for a successful candidate is truly substantial! **Location:** Leopardstown, Dublin 18 **What will you do?** * Research and identify potential new customers * Reach out to prospects via email, phone, or social media * Conduct initial conversations to gauge interest and suitability * Manage ongoing communications until a prospect becomes a customer * Manage a book of prospects * Maintain accurate information within CRM systems and gdocs **What Will You Need to Succeed?** * 1 year of experience in recruitment, retail sales, cold calling, insurance sales, telecoms or utilities sales, general transactional B2C or B2C sales or B2B sales development * Language requirement \- French \- C1 level and above * Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities. * Strong organizational and time\-management skills. * Proactive and self\-motivated with a results\-driven approach. * Flexibility to adapt to changing priorities and business needs. **What We Offer:** In our commitment to our “We Care” value, we believe in providing employees with valuable mental and physical well\-being benefits including: * Comprehensive VHI Health cover from day one * Structured training \& career development opportunities * Education reimbursement * Paid birthday leave * Personal Hardship Loan Program * Mental health and 24/7 employee assistance program * Bike To Work Scheme / Taxsaver Leap Card Scheme * Top\-performer and tenure awards **Compensation Range: €38,000 \- €44,000 EUR** *The pay for this position is basic salary per annum of €38,000 with an additional variable bonus component of €6,000 per annum.There are several factors to consider including but not limited to, the role’s responsibilities, experience, location, education/training, internal equity, and key skills. Your recruiter will provide more detailed information during the interview process.* MarketStar is firmly committed to Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and to compliance with all federal, state, and local laws that prohibit employment discrimination. Reasonable accommodations are available on request for candidates taking part in all aspects of the selection process. If you are an individual who identifies as someone with a disability and require reasonable accommodation(s) to complete any part of the job application process, please contact us at *people.success@marketstar.com* for assistance.

title: Insurance Agent
description: **Company Description:** Step into the world of OUTsurance DAC, a vibrant, ambitious, and groundbreaking new player in Ireland. We’re just getting started in Ireland and want YOU on board! At OUTsurance, we believe in delivering Awesome Service. The Operations Department, which includes Sales, Customer Service and Claims plays a pivotal role in delivering on our Service promise for our amazing customers and always treating customers fairly. **Who we want:** * We're looking for individuals who live our amazing values to join our team. * People who possess diverse personalities and remarkable character that can help us build a great company and offer a better insurance alternative to Ireland. * Great Communicator \& listener **What’s in it for you?** * Brand new office in Cherrywood, easily accessible * Full training provided to equip you with the skills and know how required. * Opportunity to be a part of a growing company with a great working culture and career progression \& development * Competitive salary with great earning potential * Insurance Exams * Generous Annual Leave * Attractive benefits package including income protection and life cover **What you’ll be doing:** * Working as part of a team who will be responsible for following up on quotations and completing calls for our new and existing home and motor insurance products over the phone – directly with our customers * Transform quotations into sales in order to assist with achieving individual and team goals. * Engaging and building rapport with customers through working on new quotations and to follow up on existing quotations. **You’ll be working in a Regulated Environment:** * This position falls under the category of a regulated control function in accordance with the regulations outline in the Central Bank Reform Act 2010 Regulations 2011\. Any appointment to this role is contingent upon the company’s assurance that the candidate fulfils the criteria stated in the Fitness and Probity standards issued by the Central Bank of Ireland. As part of this process, the company is obligated to conduct a specified due diligence procedure to evaluate the candidate's suitability and integrity. * Must be willing to work towards and meet minimum competency requirements as set out by the Central Bank of Ireland Minimum Competency Code. **Salary:** Attractive remuneration package plus uncapped bonus potential

title: Insurance Apprenticeship - Drogheda
description: **Who are we?** =============== Howden is a global insurance group with employee ownership at its heart. Together, we have pushed the boundaries of insurance. We are united by a shared passion and no\-limits mindset, and our strength lies in our ability to collaborate as a powerful international team comprised of 24,000 employees spanning over 56 countries. People join Howden for many different reasons, but they stay for the same one: our culture. It’s what sets us apart, and the reason our employees have been turning down headhunters for years. Whatever your priorities – work / life balance, career progression, sustainability, volunteering – you’ll find like\-minded people driving change at Howden. ### **Based in our Drogheda office, Howden Ireland are delighted to partner with the Atlantic Technological University Sligo and the Insurance Institute of Ireland for the Insurance apprenticeship programme. If you would like to join the apprenticeship programme, we would love to hear from you. Find out more below:** ### **About the Apprenticeship Opportunity** ### **We are looking for ambitious and talented individuals who show the potential to develop into a high performing business professional. This is an apprentice scheme that will allow the successful candidate exposure to all aspects of our business, allowing you to develop your technical expertise as well as professional skills.** ### **While on the programme, in addition to gaining on the job insurance experience, you will complete the insurance industry professional qualifications APA and CIP as well as a Bachelor of Arts (Honours) in Insurance Practice (Apprenticeship) which is Level 8 on the NFQ awarded by IT Sligo.** ### **The apprenticeship programme is a work\-based learning programme and requires timely submission of on\-the\-job assessments, attendance at and successful attainment of IT Sligo and CIP exams as part of the programme.** ### **When you join Howden, you will be assigned a dedicated business supervisor and mentor to provide support throughout the scheme while always been given on the job continuous training.** ### **We will work with you to become a valuable contributor in the success of our business, developing your own rewarding career in the insurance industry while completing the three\-year Level 8 Bachelor’s Degree course. In return, we expect you to bring the commitment and drive to add significant value to the company.** ### **About the Role:** ### **As an apprentice you will gain in\-depth knowledge of risks and the insurance market in order to arrange suitable policies \& cover for your clients. You will learn how to be an effective intermediary between our clients and insurance companies. Some Responsibilities are noted below:** * ### **Gather information from your clients, assessing their insurance needs and risk profile** * ### **Research insurance companies’ policies and negotiate with underwriters to find the most suitable insurance for your clients at the best price** * ### **Ensure that your clients understand the terms and the extent of the cover provided in line with industry regulations** * ### **Foresee your clients’ insurance needs, such as policy renewals or amendments** * ### **Advise your clients on whether and when they need to make a claim on their policies** * ### **Arrange specialised types of insurance cover in complex cases; this may involve preparing reports for insurance underwriters and surveyors and negotiating with insurers** * ### **Advise your clients on risk management and help to devise new ways to mitigate risks, for example, by adding security measures such as fencing, surveillance cameras or lighting to commercial properties to reduce the likelihood of a break\-in** * ### **Build and maintain ongoing relationships with your clients** ### **The Apprenticeship programme is a work\-based learning programme and requires timely submission of on the job assessments, attendance at and successful attainment of ATU Sligo and CIP exams as part of the programme.** ### **About You** ### **When you work in insurance your customers place a lot of trust and responsibility in your hands, so its essential that you have the necessary knowledge and skills to give them peace of mind. Some of the key attributes that the individual should have are:** * ### **Ability to communicate effectively (in both written and verbal form)** * ### **Eager to learn and want to develop within an exciting industry** * ### **Proactive approach to building and managing customer relationships** * ### **Ability to prioritise and work under time pressures** * ### **Focused, Diligent and committed to the apprenticeship and company** * ### **Excellent PC skills \- Microsoft Packages** * ### **Willing to be part of a team while working independently** ### **If you want to be part of a dynamic work environment while being rewarded for your creativity, innovation and determination, start your career with Howden.** ### **Key Questions asked before applying** ### **Interested individuals should ask themselves the following questions before applying:** * ### **Do I meet the minimum entry level requirements?** **Entry\-Requirements\-Updated.pdf** **(iii.ie)** * ### **Can I commit to a three\-year contract of apprenticeship?** * ### **Do I have the self\-motivation and time management skills to study at a BA (Hons) level and work at the same time?** * ### **Can I take ownership and accountability for my own actions and responsibilities?** ### **Application Process** * ### **Please submit your application via our careers page** * ### **Planned start date: beginning of August 2026 or sooner if available** * ### **Closing date for applications is the 7th of July** ### **About Howden Ireland** ### **Howden Ireland is part of Howden, the global insurance intermediary group, and has over 600 employees across 29 local offices advising clients on their commercial insurance, personal insurance, health insurance, life and pensions and mortgage requirements. Our success is primarily down to the incredible people we employ.** ### **For more information, please visit** **About Us \| Howden Ireland (howdengroup.com)** **What do we offer in return?** =============================== A career that you define. At Howden, we value diversity – there is no one Howden type. Instead, we’re looking for individuals who share the same values as us: * Our successes have all come from someone brave enough to try something new * We support each other in the small everyday moments and the bigger challenges * We are determined to make a positive difference at work and beyond **Reasonable adjustments** ========================== We're committed to providing reasonable accommodations at Howden to ensure that our positions align well with your needs. Besides the usual adjustments such as software, IT, and office setups, we can also accommodate other changes such as flexible hours\* or hybrid working\*. If you're excited by this role but have some doubts about whether it’s the right fit for you, send us your application – if your profile fits the role’s criteria, we will be in touch to assist in helping to get you set up with any reasonable adjustments you may require. * Not all positions can accommodate changes to working hours or locations. Reach out to your Recruitment Partner if you want to know more. Fixed Term Contract (Fixed Term)

title: Insurance Apprenticeship - North Dublin
description: Based in our North Dublin office in Swords, Howden Ireland are delighted to partner with the Atlantic Technological University Sligo and the Insurance Institute of Ireland for the Insurance apprenticeship programme. If you would like to join the apprenticeship programme, find out more below: About the Apprenticeship Opportunity We are looking for ambitious and talented individuals who show the potential to develop into a high performing business professional. This is an apprentice scheme that will allow the successful candidate exposure to all aspects of our business, allowing you to develop your technical expertise as well as professional skills. While on the programme, in addition to gaining on the job insurance experience, you will complete the insurance industry professional qualifications APA and CIP as well as a Bachelor of Arts (Honours) in Insurance Practice (Apprenticeship) which is Level 8 on the NFQ awarded by IT Sligo. The apprenticeship programme is a work\-based learning programme and requires timely submission of on\-the\-job assessments, attendance at and successful attainment of IT Sligo and CIP exams as part of the programme. When you join Howden, you will be assigned a dedicated business supervisor and mentor to provide support throughout the scheme while always been given on the job continuous training. We will work with you to become a valuable contributor in the success of our business, developing your own rewarding career in the insurance industry while completing the three\-year Level 8 Bachelor's Degree course. In return, we expect you to bring the commitment and drive to add significant value to the company. About the Role: As an apprentice you will gain in\-depth knowledge of risks and the insurance market in order to arrange suitable policies \& cover for your clients. You will learn how to be an effective intermediary between our clients and insurance companies. Some Responsibilities are noted below: * Gather information from your clients, assessing their insurance needs and risk profile * Research insurance companies' policies and negotiate with underwriters to find the most suitable insurance for your clients at the best price * Ensure that your clients understand the terms and the extent of the cover provided in line with industry regulations * Foresee your clients' insurance needs, such as policy renewals or amendments * Advise your clients on whether and when they need to make a claim on their policies * Arrange specialised types of insurance cover in complex cases; this may involve preparing reports for insurance underwriters and surveyors and negotiating with insurers * Advise your clients on risk management and help to devise new ways to mitigate risks, for example, by adding security measures such as fencing, surveillance cameras or lighting to commercial properties to reduce the likelihood of a break\-in * Build and maintain ongoing relationships with your clients The Apprenticeship programme is a work\-based learning programme and requires timely submission of on the job assessments, attendance at and successful attainment of ATU Sligo and CIP exams as part of the programme. About You When you work in insurance your customers place a lot of trust and responsibility in your hands, so its essential that you have the necessary knowledge and skills to give them peace of mind. Some of the key attributes that the individual should have are: * Ability to communicate effectively (in both written and verbal form) * Eager to learn and want to develop within an exciting industry * Proactive approach to building and managing customer relationships * Ability to prioritise and work under time pressures * Focused, Diligent and committed to the apprenticeship and company * Excellent PC skills \- Microsoft Packages * Willing to be part of a team while working independently If you want to be part of a dynamic work environment while being rewarded for your creativity, innovation and determination, start your career with Howden. Key Questions asked before applying Interested individuals should ask themselves the following questions before applying: * Do I meet the minimum entry level requirements? Entry\-Requirements\-Updated.pdf (iii.ie) * Can I commit to a three\-year contract of apprenticeship? * Do I have the self\-motivation and time management skills to study at a BA (Hons) level and work at the same time? * Can I take ownership and accountability for my own actions and responsibilities? Application Process * Please submit your application via our careers page * Planned start date: beginning of August 2026 or sooner if available * Closing date for applications is the 7th of July About Howden Ireland Howden Ireland is part of Howden, the global insurance intermediary group, and has over 600 employees across 29 local offices advising clients on their commercial insurance, personal insurance, health insurance, life and pensions and mortgage requirements. Our success is primarily down to the incredible people we employ. For more information, please visit About Us \| Howden Ireland (howdengroup.com)

Some of the key attributes that the individual should have are:** * ### **Ability to communicate effectively (in both written and verbal form)** * ### **Eager to learn and want to develop within an exciting industry** * ### **Proactive approach to building and managing customer relationships** * ### **Ability to prioritise and work under time pressures** * ### **Focused, Diligent and committed to the apprenticeship and company** * ### **Excellent PC skills \- Microsoft Packages** * ### **Willing to be part of a team while working independently** ### **If you want to be part of a dynamic work environment while being rewarded for your creativity, innovation and determination, start your career with Howden.** ### **Key Questions asked before applying** ### **Interested individuals should ask themselves the following questions before applying:** * ### **Do I meet the minimum entry level requirements?** **Entry\-Requirements\-Updated.pdf** **(iii.ie)** * ### **Can I commit to a three\-year contract of apprenticeship?** * ### **Do I have the self\-motivation and time management skills to study at a BA (Hons) level and work at the same time?** * ### **Can I take ownership and accountability for my own actions and responsibilities?** ### **Application Process** * ### **Please submit your application via our careers page** * ### **Planned start date: beginning of August 2026 or sooner if available** * ### **Closing date for applications is the 7th of July** ### **About Howden Ireland** ### **Howden Ireland is part of Howden, the global insurance intermediary group, and has over 600 employees across 29 local offices advising clients on their commercial insurance, personal insurance, health insurance, life and pensions and mortgage requirements. Our success is primarily down to the incredible people we employ.** ### **For more information, please visit** **About Us \| Howden Ireland (howdengroup.com)** **What do we offer in return?** =============================== A career that you define. At Howden, we value diversity – there is no one Howden type. Instead, we’re looking for individuals who share the same values as us: * Our successes have all come from someone brave enough to try something new * We support each other in the small everyday moments and the bigger challenges * We are determined to make a positive difference at work and beyond **Reasonable adjustments** ========================== We're committed to providing reasonable accommodations at Howden to ensure that our positions align well with your needs. Besides the usual adjustments such as software, IT, and office setups, we can also accommodate other changes such as flexible hours\* or hybrid working\*. If you're excited by this role but have some doubts about whether it’s the right fit for you, send us your application – if your profile fits the role’s criteria, we will be in touch to assist in helping to get you set up with any reasonable adjustments you may require. * Not all positions can accommodate changes to working hours or locations. Reach out to your Recruitment Partner if you want to know more. Fixed Term Contract (Fixed Term)

title: Integration Engineer (Client facing), Professional Services
description: Who we are **About Stripe** Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world's largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone's reach while doing the most important work of your career. **About The Team** Stripe's Professional Services team works with our most strategic users. You'll work on the highest\-visibility projects, providing technical expertise that helps enterprises accelerate their knowledge, refine solution design, and build robust integrations with Stripe. This role sits at the intersection of deep technical execution and strategic advisory—leading conversations and developing plans that transform the payments and financial infrastructure of leading businesses. What you'll do As an Integration Engineer on the Professional Services team, you'll own the technical relationship with Stripe's most strategic users—from initial discovery through to live integration and ongoing optimisation. You'll bring together deep technical expertise and consultative skills to help enterprises design and implement complex integrations, resolve issues at pace, and continuously improve how they use Stripe's platform. **Responsibilities** * Plan and execute integration engineering end\-to\-end, from high\-level architecture to code implementation—conducting discovery sessions, parsing specific use cases, and guiding users through high\-complexity integrations * Serve as the primary ongoing technical point of contact for large users' and partners' technical teams, resolving integration issues and owning escalations for operational issues and priority requests * Lead strategic technical conversations, articulating how Stripe works from both a product feature and API architecture perspective, and managing user expectations on timelines and product changes * Collaborate with Sales, Solution Architecture, and Implementation teams to drive user engagement and commercial outcomes on behalf of the Professional Services team * Work closely with Product and Engineering to proactively surface potential enhancements and new features based on field feedback * Provide deep technical support and debugging—inspecting the Stripe codebase, testing functionality thoroughly, building proof\-of\-concept integrations, creating user\-specific test plans, and answering ad\-hoc technical questions * Lead hands\-on keyboard implementations where required, providing substantive feedback on coding practices, CI/CD, and software architecture * Review and optimise existing user integrations, providing recommendations to improve performance, reliability, and efficiency * Build tools and analytics—including dashboards, queries, and custom data reports—to support user business reviews and operational needs * Develop reusable processes and shared knowledge to enable the broader Professional Services team Who you are We're looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement. **Minimum Requirements** * 4\+ years of experience in a software engineering or integration engineering role * Ability to write and debug code in languages such as Go, Java, C/C\+\+, or similar * Comfortable with code\-level debugging (both Stripe and user code) and using code as a practical problem\-solving tool * Strong generalist technical background, including proficiency in SQL and a solid understanding of data structures and algorithms * Understanding of the payments domain and API security principles * Able to lead technical conversations and clearly explain how Stripe works from both a product feature and API architecture perspective * User\-first mindset with the ability to map business requirements to reliable technical solutions * Confident engaging with users and leading strategic technical discussions **Preferred Qualifications** * Experience in a customer\-facing technical role such as solutions engineering, technical consulting, or implementation engineering * Experience mentoring engineers or guiding technical teams through complex implementations * Demonstrated ability to apply structured methodologies to ensure consistency and repeatability across engagements * Strong technical writing skills, including the ability to document complex integration guidance and processes * Track record of navigating and resolving ambiguous, open\-ended technical problems both independently and collaboratively In\-office expectations Office\-assigned Stripes in most of our locations are currently expected to spend at least 50% of the time in a given month in their local office or with users. This expectation may vary depending on role, team and location. For example, Stripes in Stripe Delivery Center roles in Mexico City, Mexico, Bengaluru, India, and Dublin, Ireland work 100% from the office. Also, some teams have greater in\-office attendance requirements, to appropriately support our users and workflows, which the hiring manager will discuss. This approach helps strike a balance between bringing people together for in\-person collaboration and learning from each other, while supporting flexibility when possible. Pay and benefits The annual salary range for this role in the primary location is €104,000 \- €156,000\. This range may change if you are hired in another location. For sales roles, the range provided is the role’s On Target Earnings (“OTE”) range, meaning that the range includes both the sales commissions/sales bonuses target and annual base salary for the role. This salary range may be inclusive of several career levels at Stripe and will be narrowed during the interview process based on a number of factors, including the candidate’s experience, qualifications, and specific location. Applicants interested in this role and who are not located in the primary location may request the annual salary range for their location during the interview process. Specific benefits and details about what compensation is included in the salary range listed above will vary depending on the applicant’s location and can be discussed in more detail during the interview process. Benefits/additional compensation for this role may include: equity, company bonus or sales commissions/bonuses; retirement plans; health benefits; and wellness stipends.

title: Luxury Sales Associate

This role suits someone who thrives in a high\-touch retail environment where service, discretion, and strong sales instincts are equally important. Key Responsibilities Sales \& Client Development * Drive sales through exceptional client service and styling expertise * Build and maintain a strong base of repeat clients * Develop personal relationships with customers and follow up proactively * Provide thoughtful styling advice across ready\-to\-wear, accessories and jewellery * Deliver a relaxed but confident luxury sales experience Operations * Manage opening/closing procedures * Ensure the shop floor reflects the store’s high aesthetic standards * Maintain excellent visual merchandising and product presentation * Assist with stock control, deliveries and inventory management * Maintain excellent product knowledge across designers * Support in\-store events and client appointments The Ideal Candidate * **Strong sales background**, ideally in premium or luxury retail * A natural ability to build trust and long\-term client relationships * Warm, personable and emotionally intelligent * Excellent at reading customers and adapting approach accordingly * Confident selling high\-value items without a hard\-sell approach * Strong personal style and genuine interest in fashion * Comfortable taking initiative within a small independent business The successful candidate will be confident driving sales while maintaining the warm, understated service that defines independent luxury boutiques. title: Maintenance Technician
description: Opportunity for **Electrical Maintenance Technician** to join Operations \& Maintenance team based in Dublin. This is a **DAY SHIFT** role. **Overview of the Role:** The electrical utilities engineering technician will work as part of the Dalkia Maintenance and Calibration team on a major client Biopharmaceutical site. He/she will liaise with the contract team, client engineering and equipment vendors to ensure maximum uptime of all utilities plant and equipment, and that equipment is in compliance with all regulatory, statutory and client corporate requirements. The electrical technician will train on all Processes and techniques across Predictive Maintenance, CMMS (Pemac), Reliability techniques, MV distribution, Turbines, Boilers Compressors, Diesel Generators Pumps etc. **Duties of the Role include:** * Coordinate the day to day work with shift technicians on\-site particularly morning shift changeover * Trouble\-shooting and high\-level investigation of utility plant equipment faults and failures \- root cause analysis * Compliance/quality engineering \- recording and investigation of deviations on utility plant and equipment * Carry out planned preventive, predictive and corrective maintenance as required * Good knowledge and understanding of CMMS systems * Review maintenance programme periodically to ensure optimal uptime levels are achieved * Provide leadership and mentoring to the team in developing their capability to resolve complex plant deviations and failures * Support the Site engineer in carrying out Root Cause Analysis on plant failures to determine the sequence of events, the underlying root cause and assist the in developing proposals to remedy the fault; * Provide support to capital improvement projects on utilities systems, and be involved in the commissioning and hand over from projects to operations. * Assist the Site Engineer in planning and executing complex utility service isolations for maintenance, projects and client works; * Identify, develop and, if approved, implement Continuous Improvement measures to improve the efficiency of plant and working practices; **Required Skills for the Role:** * Electrical engineering degree or diploma desirable * 5\+ years industrial experience in a similar role preferable * Senior Trades, City \& Guilds or equivalent Please forward updated CV's to aidan@synergyrecruitment.ie

title: Marketing & Social Media Intern
description: Marketing \& Social Media Intern MP Doyle Group Location: Topline Doyle’s, Carlow Town Hours: 08:30 – 17:30, Monday – Friday Job Type: Internship (On\-Site) Duration: Approx. 12 weeks / 3 months (flexible to suit college schedule) Reports to: Marketing Manager Remuneration: €15\.00 per hour Application Deadline: 1st July 2026 ABOUT MP DOYLE GROUP MP Doyle Group is one of Ireland’s longest\-established family businesses, trading since 1884\. The group operates across three businesses: **Topline Doyle’s** Hardware \& builders’ merchant, Carlow \& Tullow. Full range of trade and retail products for DIY, building, and home improvement. **Doyle’s Wholesale** B2B distributor supplying independent retailers across Ireland with leading brands including STIGA, Ariens, and Roborock. **Lots for Less** Discount retail offering a wide range of products at highly competitive prices, focused on value\-driven shoppers. **WE ARE SEEKING** We’re looking for a creative, social media\-savvy intern to join our marketing team and take an active role in content creation and social media management across all three businesses within the MP Doyle Group. This is a hands\-on role with real responsibility. You’ll be creating and publishing content to live channels, working directly with the Marketing Manager, and gaining broad exposure to both retail and wholesale marketing environments. If you’re passionate about social media, love creating content, and want to build a portfolio working across multiple brands, this is the role for you. **KEY RESPONSIBILITIES** **Topline Doyle’s** — Facebook, Instagram, TikTok \& LinkedIn – Capture and edit content for use across Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn – Stay on top of trends, sounds, formats, and evolving social media best practices – Assist with the development and execution of a content strategy that aligns with campaigns and commercial objectives – Maintain a content calendar with a varied content mix: product showcases, shop showcases, trending content, community involvement, and more – Optimise company social profiles to accurately reflect brand identity – Foster interaction and engagement across all social channels – Cross\-department collaboration: work alongside other teams to ensure social media activity supports wider commercial objectives – Monitor and report on social media analytics and channel performance – Support other ad hoc marketing activities as required, including POS and in\-store design requirements **Lots for Less** — Facebook, Instagram, TikTok – Capture and edit content for use across Facebook and Instagram – Assist with the development and execution of a content strategy that highlights the product range, value, and competitive advantage versus other local retailers **Doyle’s Wholesale** — Facebook \& Instagram – Schedule and publish supplier\-issued content across our portfolio of global brands (STIGA, Ariens, Roborock) – Maintain a content calendar across all wholesale brand channels to ensure a consistent and timely publishing schedule **WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR** – A creative individual who is genuinely passionate about social media and stays ahead of platform trends – Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with a strong sense of brand voice and audience – Sharp eye for detail in both visual design and written content – Experience with content creation tools such as Canva, CapCut, and/or Adobe Premiere Pro is essential – Strong creative flair with the ability to tell compelling stories through both visuals and copy – Ability to multi\-task and manage multiple projects independently in a fast\-paced environment – Basic photography skills — comfortable capturing content in\-store and on location – Knowledge of analytics tools such as GA4 and Meta Business Suite an advantage – Experience or familiarity with Meta Ads Manager and TikTok Ads Manager is an advantage – A willingness to be on camera is an advantage – Currently studying or recently graduated in Marketing, Communications, Media, Digital Marketing, or a related discipline The right candidate will have every opportunity to grow with us. For someone who throws themselves into the role, there is a possibility of extending beyond the initial internship period and, in time, progressing into a permanent full\-time position within the marketing team. To apply, send your CV and examples of content you’ve created to **kbuggy@doylesw.ie** We’d love to see what you can do. Pay: €15\.00 per hour Work Location: In person

title: Mechanical Design Engineer
description: Mechanical Design Engineer, Mercury Headquarters, Ballycoolin, Dublin Apply Now **Mercury is the European leader in construction solutions.** We build and manage complex engineering \& construction projects for the world’s leading corporations. Our solutions help deliver technologies and life changing advancements that connect people, communities, and businesses, giving them the power to achieve incredible things. Our people have the courage to be innovative. Their determination and sharp focus enable us to deliver with certainty, time and time again. We deliver our clients’ visions through leading edge construction solutions across multiple sectors, including Enterprise Data Centers, Advanced Technology \& Life Sciences, Hyperscale Data Centers, Fire Protection. At Mercury, it is our duty to encourage and back our people to realize their vision of themselves. We place them at the heart of what we do, providing challenging opportunities to develop within a great team in a supportive environment that allows them to reach their full potential. The Design Engineer plays a key role within the pre‑construction team, supporting multiple enterprise and hyperscale data centre projects across a diverse client portfolio. Working at the front end of projects, the role focuses on early\-stage design development (PCSA), technical assurance, constructability, and risk mitigation in close collaboration with clients, consultants, and the wider supply chain. This position offers exposure to complex, high‑value data centre developments and the opportunity to influence design, cost, and delivery outcomes from inception. **Key Responsibilities Of The Role** Provide support to Pre\-construction team on all Engineering functions including, but not limited to the following: * Familiarization of Design/ specifications and drawings to fully understand the scope of the Project. * Assist in generation and finalization of estimates, tender documents and resourcing of tender projects. * Review the MEP design and conduct value engineering exercises to optimize mechanical design solutions. * To support the engineering requirements through managing \& liaising with Key Project Stakeholders (Client, Suppliers, Sub\-contractors, Vendors). * Ensure the design process recognizes current legislation, standards and codes of practice, where appropriate. * Lead the complete design team including the design consultant, the client, architect and BIM team. * Interface management between all parties to allow for an efficient design process. * Responsible for management of RIBA design processes and procedures. * Review equipment specifications and generate procurement packages. * Assessment of Sub\-contract and Supplier Tender returns for Technical compliance with design intent specifications. * Review the construction methodology to identify program implications and building logistics. * Interrogate tender documentation (drawings, specifications, tender addenda, and all other documentation) for commercial risks and scope gaps relating to deliverables. * Identify project risks and mitigation plans to deal with these risks. * Mentor and support less experienced engineers, promoting knowledge sharing and professional development. * Evaluate and promote the use of new engineering practices and processes to enhance delivery time of projects. * Attend industry events and training sessions to maintain a current understanding of market trends and best practices. **Essential Criteria For The Role** * 8\+ years experience working with a recognized contractor as a mechanical engineer. * Relevant engineering experience in a general contracting environment is required. * Honors degree (NFQ Level 8 for Ireland) in Mechanical engineering. * Proven ability to lead projects, manage technical and financial aspects, and deliver high quality mechanical systems. * Design and implementation of mechanical systems such as Critical cooling, HVAC, plumbing, and fire protection. * Knowledge of electrical systems supporting the mechanical plant. * Strong understanding of industry standards, regulatory requirements, and value engineering principles. * Experience in mentoring junior engineers and fostering collaboration within multidisciplinary teams. * Competence in design software such as Navis works, ACC, BlueBeam or similar platforms. * Strong communication skills to liaise effectively with stakeholders and external consultants. **Desirable** * Chartered Engineer preferred (or working towards it). **Mercury is an equal opportunities employer.** Apply Now

title: Mechanical Estimator
description: Elusav Recruitment have an exciting opportunity for a Mechanical Estimator with one of the most reputable and largest Engineering contractors in Europe. Based in Dublin. The role will involve preparing detailed estimates and competitive tenders for large\-scale Data Centre projects across Europe. You would be responsible for reviewing drawings and specifications, managing quantities and pricing, coordinating with subcontractors and suppliers, identifying project risks, and working closely with both Mechanical, Electrical and CSA teams throughout the tender process. **Responsibilities:** * Produce reports for management for bids and monthly meetings. * Prepare estimates based on drawings and specifications. * Manage quantities and prepare pricing document. * Oversea pricing for elements of the building from the Irish and European subcontractors and suppliers. * Utilise spreadsheets to compare subcontractors bids and quotations, and to demonstrate reasoning for selecting subcontractors. * Assist in the maintenance of the cost data base. * Present the estimate to the Estimating Director, and to the Board of Directors, where and when required. * Build relationships with key vendors (subcontractors, suppliers, engineers etc). * Keep informed with developments in the construction industry. * Participate in the development of procedures to ensure a high standard of quality control in the documents produced by the Estimating Department. * Co\-operate with the application of quality assurance procedures. * Mentor and train junior members of the team. * Co\-ordinate and collaborate with the CSA \& Electrical Estimators. **Requirements:** * 4\+ years experience within a Mechanical capacity. * Estimating or Quantity Surveying background. * Knowledge of FIDIC contracts is desirable. * Proficiency in the use of Microsoft Word, Excel, and in at least one of the more widely used QS BQ production software packages \- e.g. Buildsoft or CostX. * Understand the requirement to achieve a high level of quality in the production of subcontractor tender documentation and tender submission. **Contact:** If you would like to learn more about the vacancy, apply now, or contact Thaissa Torres at Ttorres@elusav.com or \+353 1 582 2807\.

title: Merchandiser
description: Because your perspective shapes trends. Innovate, your way. Merchandising at Primark Our merchandising team turn strategic goals into vast opportunities. Here, your insights will maximise our growth as a business and ensure we continue to stay at the forefront in the world of retail fashion. **What you’ll do:** As a Merchandiser at Primark, you play a critical role in the delivery of the product strategy in Primark. In partnership with the Buying teams, you will be responsible for building and delivering your section strategy through strong commercial, analytical and influencing skills. You will work in partnership with your Buying team and lead a team of Assistant and Trainee Merchandisers to manage the execution of this strategy through ensuring the right product is in the right place at the right time to maximise sales and profit performance. While supporting Primark as a global brand, you will also understand our regional customers, and use data and analytics to tailor ranges which will deliver for the different customers in all our global markets. You will maintain a keen awareness and understanding of current and evolving social and economic landscapes, with a focus on sustainability under Primark Cares as a key strategic pillar for the business. As a Merchandiser, you will support the Head of Merchandising in continually seeking to identify new opportunities to enhance our value proposition, while supporting the departmental delivery of sales, markdown, stock turn and contribution budgets. In your role, you’ll collaborate with different people across a range of skillsets. Here’s a flavour of your day\-to\-day: * Leadership: As a senior leader at Primark, you are empowered to build, coach and develop an engaging and high performing team. Demonstrate a passion for continuous development, by setting clear performance expectations. Share constructive feedback to motivate colleagues. Recognise and celebrate successes. * Commercial Awareness: Maintain an extensive knowledge of the market to anticipate and quickly respond to factors such as competitor activity, socio\-economic pressures in different regions, changing customer behaviours and price sensitivities. Use your knowledge of the regional customer to tailor your ranges and exceed financial targets. * Strategy and Planning: Build a commercial and strategic range which considers regional differences, and allows balance of newness, colour, price and product attributes, relevant to season and grades. Responsible for driving and delivering strategy within your team, guiding and monitoring the delivery of strategic goals and measuring the delivery of goals using KPIs, sales, profit and market share increases. * Forecasting and Trading: Work closely with the Head of Merchandising to agree all financial macro\-targets. Manage tools and reporting to review information and ensure that all aspects of strategic planning are met (including WSSIs, Line Projections, Option Planning and Budgeting). Responsible for managing stock targets in line with depot/warehouse capacities. * Product Knowledge: Develop a deep, broad knowledge of Primark product in multiple product areas. Consider factors such as past products and competitor analysis when building ranges. **What you’ll get:** People are at the heart of what we do here, so it’s essential we provide you with the right environment to perform at your very best. Let’s talk lifestyle: * 27 days of leave, plus bank holidays and if you want, you can buy 5 more. * Flexible Working, opportunity for an early Friday finish, and a subsidised cafeteria. * Healthcare, pension, and potential bonus **What you’ll bring:** Here are some of the experiences and skills you’ll need for the role: * 5 years’ experience in a Merchandising role with at least 2 years in a people management/team lead position, or equivalent relevant experience. * Relevant qualification in a fashion\-, retail\- or commerce\-related subject, or equivalent experience * You will be a skilled influencer, effective at managing a large network of stakeholders to reach effective commercial decisions. Strong relationship builder with a proven record of managing stakeholders cross functionally. * Strategic thinker, with strong numerical and commercial acumen * Demonstrated experience in building and developing a high performing team * Excellent communication and engagement skills. Does this sound like you? Great, because we can’t wait to see what you’ll bring. You’ll be supported within a team of equally capable people, celebrating who you are and aiding you reach your potential. At Primark, we’re excited about our future \- and we’re excited to develop yours. At Primark, people matter. They’re the beating heart of our business and the reason we’ve grown from our first store in Dublin in 1969 to a £9bn\+ turnover business a over 80,000 colleagues and over 440 stores in 17 countries today. Our values run through everything we do. In essence, we're Caring and always strive to put people first. We're also Dynamic, bravely pushing the boundaries to stay ahead. And finally, we succeed Together. If you need any reasonable adjustments or have an accessibility requests, during your recruitment journey, such as extended time or breaks between online assessments, a sign language interpreter, mobility access, or assistive technology please contact your talent acquisition specialist. \#Hybrid **REQ ID:** REF147E

title: Mgr, Field Service

You drive corporate image through successful customer service. Provide leadership and managerial guidance to direct reporting staff. Ensures, by performing successful operational activities, that they achieve continuous customer satisfaction and targeted KPI (Key Performance Indicators) goals. The position implies development and implementation of operational plans, procedures to reach total customer trust and increase customer service and spares market share. This is a full time position, and is based in Kildare, Ireland. **What You’ll Do** * Discerns and analyses needs of accounts and market. Works closely with Field operations and management to recognize customer requirements. Support strategies to sell our products and services to capitalize on growth or supplier substitution. * Professionally represents the company, products and customer service performance to relevant fabs to develop and maintain excellent customer relations as well as excellent corporate image. * Analyses customer problems and needs, evaluates product and service performance and generates action plans. Supports direct reports in managing their team activities, by monitoring performance, utilization and financial expenses and in leading staff. Also responsible for handling the administrative and reporting functions. * Leads the supervisors and team by informing and communicating on all relevant department and general business issues, gives feedback on individual and team performance and culture and supports the professional development and training of individuals and team in total. * Develops the departmental budgets under corporate guidelines and monitors the performance against budget targets for revenue and costs. * Prepares, organizes, monitors and supports the information flow and communications with Sales, Tech Support, Field Process Engineering and Spares as well as customers to recognize and resolve customer technical requirements. Develops and manages escalation guidelines and activities. **Who We’re Looking For** * Technical certification /Diploma or university degree, preferably in electric\-mechanical or electronic engineering / Masters * 5\-7\+ years in the service business, preferably in semiconductor equipment industry, plus 2\-3 years of managerial experience. Customer management and business experience would be a very valuable plus. **Required Competencies And Experiences** * Role model in Core Value behaviour * Self\-Management (time management, prioritizing) * Flexibility and adaptability * Experience in Business planning, execution as well as management of metrics \& accountability systems including financial/budget * Advanced team leading/leadership/management skills (including Situational Leadership) * Supporting employee development * Coaching teams and individuals to success/Managing conflicts * Managing customer interface and customer relationship in a Multi\-cultural environment with external and internal customers * Understanding of customer business and ability to find opportunities where Lam adds value to the customer * Excellent written/verbal communication including strong presentation skills and PS\&DM skills * Availability for travels (regional and international) \> 30% * Fluent English * Cross cultural understanding and ability to work in a matrix environment **Our commitment** We believe it is important for every person to feel valued, included, and empowered to achieve their full potential. By bringing unique individuals and viewpoints together, we achieve extraordinary results. Lam Research ("Lam" or the "Company") is an equal opportunity employer. Lam is committed to and reaffirms support of equal opportunity in employment and non\-discrimination in employment policies, practices and procedures on the basis of race, religious creed, color, national origin, ancestry, physical disability, mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth and related medical conditions), gender, gender identity, gender expression, age, sexual orientation, or military and veteran status or any other category protected by applicable federal, state, or local laws. It is the Company's intention to comply with all applicable laws and regulations. Company policy prohibits unlawful discrimination against applicants or employees. *Lam offers a variety of work location models based on the needs of each role. Our hybrid roles combine the benefits of on\-site collaboration with colleagues and the flexibility to work remotely and fall into two categories – On\-site Flex and Virtual Flex. ‘On\-site Flex’ you’ll work 3\+ days per week on\-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, with the opportunity to work remotely for the balance of the week. ‘Virtual Flex’ you’ll work 1\-2 days per week on\-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, and remotely the rest of the time.*

clients on the property market in an effective manner. * Responsible for managing a portfolio of properties, ensuring proactive and regular communication with vendors so they are kept up\-to\-date in relation to the progress of the sales process through to completion – viewings, offers, buyer feedback, etc. * To negotiate the sale of properties, managing vendor expectations and the bidding process with multiple buyers, ensuring an excellent customer service at all times. * To assist in the winning of business for the branch, improving the depth \& quality of the existing fee base. * Deliver a positive customer service experience for all vendors, buyers and potential buyers, from calls to viewings, qualifying needs, following through on commitments, increasing vendor \& buyer satisfaction, leading to recommendations \& repeat business. * Be an effective team member of the branch team contributing to the development of the branch business plan, while supporting each other in the achievement of KPIs. * Assist in the development and mentoring of graduates/junior and intermediate staff in relation to their career development and succession planning. * To use your initiative to identify potential opportunities and make recommendations that should be pursued to grow revenue, market share and improve service levels. * Responsible for managing buyers from meeting them at viewings, to ensuring they are qualified on Agency Cloud and communicating with them on a regular basis, so that they are re\-qualified when appropriate and matched against suitable properties in a timely fashion. * Manages workload to exceed our customers’ expectations by producing work to the highest professional standard, representing the brand in the best way possible. * Actively develops new business opportunities through relationships, networking and marketing activities to enhance our brand and reputation in your area and community. * Ensure that deposits are promptly recorded and boards in line with the necessary procedures \& timelines. * Identifies \& acts on cross referrals as they present themselves across the Group – Financial Services, Lettings, New Homes, Countrywide. *
